title: HPSC Assistant District Attorney Vacancy 2026, Check Detail & Apply Online -
short_info: HPSC Assistant District Attorney Vacancy 2026: Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) has issued a notification for the position of Assistant District Attorney. The recruitment drive comprises 255 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 29-05-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the HPSC Assistant District Attorney Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
